nodes.context: A Penang-based Chinese secret society active in Malaya and Singapore, involved in bribery, extortion, and mercenary activities.
A Chinese secret society that was a rival of the Hai San Society, involved in tin mining conflicts in Larut.
A Chinese secret society that was absorbed by the Hai San Society around 1854.

nodes.original_text_name: Tokong or Tua Peh Kong society
nodes.context: A Penang-based Chinese secret society allied with the Hai San Society, financing tin mining in Larut.

edges.context: The two societies fought in the Larut Wars over tin-rich fields and clashed in Selangor.
The Hai San Society absorbed the Wah Sang society around 1854.
The Hai San Society was allied with the Tokong society, which financed tin mining in Larut.
